title: Apple iPhone Tech Talk 2009 tricks and treats
summary: Today I took a day off from work to attend the iPhone Apple Tech Talk 2009 in Toronto. I learned a few cool things and though I should share it with the two lost developers that may stumble on this page. I haven't had time to test and verify all of this so as usual: Do your own testing and trust nobody!.
